use_when: user requests local QR login to WeChat Official Accounts
user requests latest or today's posts from a named account
user requests article body retrieval or local export
user requests a local session without DOUBAOYA_API_KEY
user requests public article discovery or keyword search without QR login
user requests reading, like, recommendation, or comment metrics
user requests account analysis, trend research, or topic ideation

precedence: Evaluate the highest-priority matching route first.
Explicit local QR, article-body, or archive intent selects mp-ark-local-archive even when the request also says Official Account.
Explicit interaction-metric intent selects doubaoya-cloud-public-data because MP Ark does not support those metrics.
When both archive and metric intents are present, split the work across the two routes and state each capability boundary.

forbidden_misroutes.reason: MP Ark must not fabricate or promise unsupported interaction metrics.
Cloud discovery skills must not replace the user-approved local archive workflow.
